name: 02-single-tool-call
description: Model calls one tool, gets the result, summarizes it, end_turn. Two iterations.

input.systemPrompt: You read files when asked. Be terse.

definition.name: read_file
definition.description: Read a file from disk and return its contents.

tools.defaultResult:
# Open Agent X

Local-first agent runtime.

responses.delta: The README says 'Open Agent X' — a local-first agent runtime.
